economic_notes: Investment in Keseechiwan Holdings Limited Partnership recorded at cost of $60,000. First Nation maintains bison inventory valued at $47,260.
notes: Total government transfers calculated as CMHC $402,667 + File Hills Qu'Appelle Tribal Council $203,109 + First Nations Trust $129,206 + ISC $7,327,558 + ISC Health Canada $857,038 = $8,919,578 plus interest from trust funds $1,937 and rental from CMHC-related sources excluded; OSR includes interest income $5,772 + other income $714,731 + rental income $588,154 = $1,308,657. Audit report dated October 7, 2023 for fiscal year ended March 31, 2022 — significant delay. Investment in Keseechiwan Holdings Limited Partnership accounted for at cost. No remuneration schedule included in provided pages. Expenses by program are partially identified from income statement line items rather than a formal segment schedule.
